name: WSOP Event #55: $250,000 Super High Roller No-Limit Hold'em
exclusion_reason: 75-entry re-entry field; full entrant list and per-player re-entry counts not available from fetchable sources. Only partial in-the-money data confirmed; full payout table needs verification against The Hendon Mob.
notes: Confirmed: Santhosh Suvarna won $5,415,152 over 75 entries, prize pool $18,675,000, defeating Ben Tollerene heads-up. Remaining payout places not yet verified, so only the winner is recorded here.
